_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6)**_

The user wants two things:
1. Add edit option for admins (edit users, edit company sócios entries)
2. Fix the HTML layout issues (the header looks messy with buttons overlapping the title as seen in the screenshot)
3. Make the layout more professional/serious for a law and accounting firm

Let me look at the current state of all files to understand what needs to be changed.

From the screenshot I can see:
- The header buttons are overlapping the title text
- The buttons are positioned absolutely on top of the header content
- The overall color scheme (purple gradient) could be made more professional

I need to:
1. Fix the header layout - the user-info buttons should be below or to the side properly, or perhaps put them in a top bar


2. Switch to a more professional color palette like dark navy or charcoal instead of the purple gradient
3. Add edit capabilities for admins to manage users and company data
4. Review the current files to see what needs updating
